basic_details.job_title: Oil India Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 49 Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Oil India Limited (OIL), a Maharatna PSU under Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, Government of India
basic_details.post_name: Junior Technician (Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, Instrument Mechanic, Surveyor), Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer (Electrical)
basic_details.department: Oil India Limited - Field Headquarters, Duliajan, Assam
basic_details.job_location: Field Headquarters, Duliajan, Assam (working in shifts in production & exploration areas of Assam & Arunachal Pradesh)
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Limited Recruitment 2026: Get the latest OIL recruitment notification 2026 for 49 vacancies under Special Recruitment Drive for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) including Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, and Junior Engineer posts at Oil India Limited, a Maharatna Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas, Government of India. The online application process starts on 8th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 8th June 2026. Find Oil India Limited PwBD vacancies at Field Headquarters, Duliajan, Assam on the official website ww

application_fee.details: All PwBD candidates are exempted from payment of application fee for this special recruitment drive.

age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on the crucial date i.e. 08-06-2026. PwBD candidates get 10 years relaxation over and above the category-wise relaxation as applicable. Additional relaxations are available for Ex-Servicemen (PwBD), OIL employees, Work Contract Labourers, and Apprentices as per company rules. | Note: Additional age relaxations as applicable for Ex-Servicemen (PwBD), OIL employees, Work Contract Labourers of OIL, and Trade/Diploma Apprentices of OIL as per company rules. Maximum age under any circumstance is subject to specific relaxations mentioned in the notification.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the crucial date i.e. 08-06-2026. Only candidates possessing the exact prescribed qualifications should apply. This recruitment drive is exclusively for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) from Assam and Arunachal Pradesh only. Candidates must possess minimum 40% benchmark disability certificate issued by competent authority. | Post-Wise Educational Qualification | Additional Requirements: | Valid Disability Certificate showing minimum 40% or more benchmark disability issued by competent authority Employment Exchange Registration Card from Assam or Arunachal Pradesh (mandatory for PwBD candidates from these states) Trade/Diploma Apprentices of OIL who have completed training successfully will get additional age relaxation and preference as per rules

vacancy_details.PwBD Category: Category b (Deaf and Hard of Hearing)
Category c (Locomotor disability including cerebral palsy, leprosy cured, dwarfism, acid attack victims and muscular dystrophy)
Category d&e (Autism, intellectual disability, specific learning disability and mental illness, Multiple disabilities)

salary_details.details: The selected candidates will be appointed on regular basis with pay scale as per the grade of the post. The posts involve working in shifts in arduous and hazardous conditions in remote/far-flung OIL installations across production and exploration areas of Assam and Arunachal Pradesh.

selection_process: A General English & GK/Awareness + Questions on OIL 20
C Domain/Technical Knowledge (related to respective post/trade) 60

Selection will be done through a single stage Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by Document Verification. There is no interview for this recruitment. The CBT will be conducted at designated centers and travel fare reimbursement (2nd class Rail/Bus) will be provided for appearing in CBT.
Total Marks: 100 Duration: 2 Hours 40 Minutes (including 40 minutes compensatory time for PwBD candidates) Qualifying Marks: 40 marks out of 100 Negative Marking: No Tentative CBT Date: 12-07-2026
Scribe facility is available for eligible PwBD candidates as per RPwD Act
Candidates qualifying in CBT will be called for Document Verification. All original documents along with self-attested copies must be produced at the time of verification.
Candidates will be provided travel fare reimbursement (2nd class Rail/Bus fare) for appearing in CBT as per company rules.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Oil India Limited official website (www.oil-india.com) under "Career at OIL" section. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 08-05-2026 (14:00 Hrs) to 08-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs). Candidates can apply for only one post.
Steps to Apply Online:
Step 1: Visit Official Website - Go to www.oil-india.com → Career at OIL → Current Openings
Step 2: Register - Click on the relevant advertisement link and register with required details
Step 3: Fill Application Form - Fill the online application form with all required details accurately
Step 4: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of: Recent coloured passport-size photograph (as per specifications) Signature (as per specifications)
Recent coloured passport-size photograph (as per specifications)
Signature (as per specifications)
Step 5: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
Step 6: Take Printout - Keep a printout of the submitted application for future reference
Important Note: No application fee is required for PwBD candidates.
Documents to be Uploaded / Carried for Document Verification:
Recent coloured passport-size photograph and signature (as per specifications)
Class 10 Admit Card / Pass Certificate / Marksheet (for Date of Birth proof)
Educational qualification certificates & marksheets (Class 10, 10+2, Diploma as applicable)
Trade Certificate (NCVT/SCVT) as applicable for respective post
Valid Electrical Supervisor Competency Certificate (Parts 1, 2, 3 & 4) for Junior Engineer (Electrical) post
Diploma/Certificate in Computer Application (minimum 06 months) for Junior Office Assistant post
Valid Disability Certificate showing minimum 40% or more benchmark disability issued by competent authority
Caste Certificate (SC/ST/OBC-NCL) issued by competent authority (if applicable)
Employment Exchange Registration Card from Assam or Arunachal Pradesh
Apprenticeship Certificate from OIL (if applicable)
Discharge Certificate (for Ex-Servicemen PwBD candidates)
Work Contract Labour Certificate from OIL (if applicable)
Any other relevant documents as mentioned in the notification
Apply Online at: Click Here
important_instructions: This Special Recruitment Drive is exclusively for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) from Assam and Arunachal Pradesh only Candidates must possess minimum 40% or more benchmark disability certificate issued by competent authority Candidates can apply for only one post. Multiple applications will be rejected All eligibility criteria including age, qualification, disability percentage etc. will be calculated as on the crucial date i.e. 08-06-2026 Employment Exchange Registration Card from Assam or Arunachal Pradesh is mandatory The posts involve working in shifts in arduous and hazardous conditions in remote/far-flung OIL installations across production and exploration areas of Assam and Arunachal Pradesh Scribe facility is available for eligible PwBD candidates as per RPwD Act, 2016 guidelines Compensatory time of 40 minutes will be provided to PwBD candidates in CBT (Total duration: 2 Hours 40 Minutes) There is no negative marking in the Computer Based Test Qualifying marks for CBT is 40 out of 100 Travel fare reimbursement (2nd class Rail/Bus fare) will be provided for appearing in CBT There is no interview. Selection is based on CBT performance and Document Verification only Trade/Diploma Apprentices of OIL who have completed training successfully will get additional age relaxation and preference as per rules All communications regarding admit card, result, and other notifications will be sent via email/SMS only. Candidates must provide valid email ID and mobile number Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification The number of vacancies is tentative and subject to change The decision of OIL Management will be final and binding on all matters related to this recruitment Any dispute will be subject to the jurisdiction of Dibrugarh District Court only Candidates are advised to visit the official website www.oil-india.com regularly for all updates regarding CBT date, admit card, results, and other important notifications

faq.question: Q1. What is Oil India Limited PwBD Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: Oil India Limited PwBD Special Recruitment Drive 2026 is a dedicated recruitment initiative under Advertisement No. HRAQ/REC‑WP‑B/26‑148 dated 08 May 2026 to fill 49 backlog and shortfall vacancies reserved for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) in Grade III and Grade VII workperson posts at OIL’s Field Headquarters, Duliajan.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under Oil India PwBD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification announces a total of 49 PwBD‑only vacancies across Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant and Junior Engineer (Electrical) posts, with 45 posts in Grade III and 4 posts in Grade VII, classified as backlog/shortfall vacancies against the PwBD reservation.

faq.question: Q3. Which posts are available in the Oil India PwBD Special Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Posts include Junior Technician (Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, Instrument Mechanic, Surveyor), Junior Office Assistant, and Junior Engineer (Electrical), all to be filled at Oil India’s Field Headquarters, Duliajan, with job responsibilities in production, exploration and field operations in Assam and Arunachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q4. What are the important dates for Oil India Limited PwBD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online registration starts on 08 May 2026 from 14:00 hours and closes on 08 June 2026 at 23:59 hours, while the Computer Based Test (CBT) is tentatively scheduled for 12 July 2026, with 08 June 2026 as the crucial date for determining age, qualification and other eligibility.

faq.question: Q5. Who can apply for Oil India PwBD Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: Only Persons with Benchmark Disabilities who are domiciled in the states of Assam and Arunachal Pradesh and meet the prescribed educational and trade/technical qualifications for the respective post codes are eligible to apply under this special drive.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for Oil India PwBD posts?
faq.answer: Junior Technician posts require Class 10 pass plus an NCVT/SCVT Trade Certificate in the relevant trade (Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, Instrument Mechanic, Surveyor). Junior Office Assistant requires 10+2 plus a minimum 6‑month Diploma/Certificate in Computer Applications. Junior Engineer (Electrical) requires Class 10 plus a 3‑year Diploma in Electrical Engineering along with a valid Electrical Supervisor Competency Certificate for Parts 1, 2, 3 and 4.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Oil India PwBD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit as on 08 June 2026 is 40 years for General PwBD candidates, 45 years for SC/ST PwBD and 43 years for OBC (NCL) PwBD candidates, with additional relaxations for eligible ex‑servicemen, apprentices, work‑charged labourers and OIL departmental candidates as per rules.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for Oil India Limited PwBD Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category under this special recruitment drive, and all eligible PwBD candidates can apply online free of cost through the official Oil India website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process and exam pattern for Oil India PwBD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a single Computer Based Test (CBT) of 100 marks followed by document verification, with three sections—General English & General Awareness including questions on OIL (20 marks), Reasoning and Numerical/Mental Ability (20 marks), and Domain/Technical Knowledge (60 marks); the test has no negative marking, includes compensatory time for PwBD candidates and requires a minimum of 40 marks out of 100 to qualify.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for Oil India Limited PwBD Special Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible PwBD candidates must visit the “Career at OIL → Current Openings” section on the official Oil India website, fill the online application form, upload scanned copies of their photograph, signature, educational and disability certificates and other required documents, and finally submit and print the application for use at the document verification stage.
